description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte black and metallic finish, characterized by a long, vented barrel and a prominent pump-action fore-end. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, with visible ribbing and venting along the barrel for heat dissipation. The stock is a skeletonized, folding type with a pistol grip, providing ergonomic handling and reduced weight. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a standard trigger. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments. The shotgun's components, including the pump, stock, and barrel, are clearly defined and visually distinct.
description: A tactical, pump-action shotgun with a vented barrel, skeletonized folding stock, and pistol grip, finished in matte black and metallic tones. Features include a ribbed fore-end and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the vented barrel, pump-action fore-end, pistol grip, and skeletonized folding stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, ribbed fore-end, and the narrow profile of the stock and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with clear visibility of the pump and stock structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the folding stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top and a long barrel profile
attribute_stock_type: skeletonized folding stock with pistol grip
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
